questions.label: Filing Status
questions.description: The Head of Household status applies to unmarried individuals who have a relative living with them in their home. If unsure, read the CA Filing Status explanation.

questions.label: Withholding Allowance
questions.description: This value is needed to calculate the employee's CA income tax withholding. If unsure, use the CA DE-4 form to calculate the value manually.

questions.label: Additional Withholding
questions.description: You can withhold an additional amount of California income taxes here.

questions.label: File a New Hire Report?
questions.description: State law requires you to file a new hire report within 20 days of hiring or re-hiring an employee.

options.label: Yes, file the state new hire report for me.

label.description: A short title for the question

description.description: An explaination of the question - this may contain inline html formatted links.

key.description: A unique identifier of the question (for the given state) - used for updating the answer.

type.description: Describes the type of question - Text, Number, Select, Currency, Date

options.description: For "Select" type questions, the allowed values and display labels.

value.description: An allowed value to answer the question

label.description: A display label that corresponds to the answer value

value.description: The answer to the corresponding question - this may be a string, number, boolean, or null.

valid_from.description: The effective date of the answer - currently always “2010-01-01”.

valid_up_to.description: The effective end date of the answer - currently always null.
